overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a rural dirt path through golden wheat fields, approaching and circumnavigating a large wooden windmill on a bright summer day with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural farmland path with wheat fields

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant windmill

entered.detail: golden wheat field stretching along the left side of the path
winding dirt trail through the farmland
dense green forest bordering the right side of the path
large dark wooden windmill with four blades visible in the distance
tall stone tower visible on the horizon beyond the windmill

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through open farmland, with golden wheat fields to the left and dense forest to the right. The wooden windmill stands prominently ahead under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: wooden signpost with bird figure comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the windmill grows larger in the frame

entered.detail: wooden post with carved bird figure on top near the windmill entrance

segments.scene_description: The path continues toward the imposing wooden windmill, which dominates more of the frame as Geralt approaches. The wheat field remains on the left while a wooden signpost appears on the right near the windmill's base.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing under and around the wooden windmill

events.description: windmill blades and structure temporarily block portions of the sky as Geralt passes underneath

agents.ego_description: walking around the right side of the windmill, passing under its blades and wooden structure

entered.detail: wooden staircase attached to the side of the windmill structure

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes under the massive wooden windmill structure, with its stairs and mechanical details visible up close. The wheat field falls behind as the path curves around the building, and the sky becomes partially obscured by the windmill blades.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path beyond the windmill

events.description: abandoned wooden cart comes into view on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path away from the windmill into the open grassy fields

entered.detail: abandoned wooden wagon with wheels sitting beside the path
simple wooden fence posts lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Moving past the windmill, the path continues through open grassy countryside. A wooden cart sits abandoned on the left side of the path, and a simple fence lines the right. The windmill recedes into the background as Geralt walks deeper into the rural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural path that leads from open farmland toward a towering windmill and back into the quiet countryside. It begins with Geralt walking between golden wheat fields and a dense forest, with the wooden windmill standing prominently in the distance under a partly cloudy sky. As the camera advances, the windmill grows to dominate the frame, passing a wooden signpost before moving directly beneath the massive structure's stairs and mechanical beams. The scene then shifts as the path curves around the building, momentarily obscuring the sky with the rotating blades before the wheat fields fall away. Finally, the camera follows Geralt past an abandoned wooden cart and a simple fence, leaving the windmill to recede into the background as he walks deeper into the open grassy landscape.
